creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This has to be the best new immersive game to play in London, my heart was RACING! This is Lander23 by @punchdrunkint, a computer game-derived live-action sci-fi experience and it’s incredible 🔥

👾 Play in groups of four, where two of you run around in the field (an alien planet). You’ll be going into different rooms, tents, shelters and more, guided by your teammates at base, who can see where you have to go to collect the all-important Radiance.
☠️ But BEWARE, the guards are out to catch you and if they do, you’ll lose lives.
↔️ Swap halfway through so your teammates can experience the field too and work together to collect as much Radiance as possible before the time runs out!

Find all the details here:

🎟️ Tickets: use code EXPLORING10 for 10% off all standard tickets for Lander 23

ℹ️ Lander 23 is played in teams of four. If you wish to play in the same team, your booking must be for four tickets. If you purchase less than four tickets, you will be paired up with other players at random.

⏳ Running time: Approximately 1h 30 in total: 30 mins of briefing and onboarding, 1 hour in the game space.

👥 12-16 year olds must be accompanied by an adult on a 1:1 basis; i.e. for every child in the booking, there must be one adult (18+) accompanying them.

transcription.text: This might look like a tiny building in Woolwich, but it has one of the craziest experiences we've ever done in London. It's called Lander 23, and you're basically working in groups of four, where two of you stay on board, guiding the other two teammates who are down on the field. You're trying to collect this substance called Radiance, but at the same time, beware, because the guards are out to catch you. And you are going to be navigating, hiding, and shielding, making sure you don't get caught, and trying to make it back to base. Guys, it feels like an absolute maze when you're on the field, so communication with your team is key. You do get to swap roles halfway through, so everyone gets a chance to go on the field, and it's a massive space. Oh, and if the guards do catch you, you've got three lives, and then you're out. I couldn't recommend this experience more. It is so immersive and gives you such an adrenaline rush. I was absolutely buzzing at the end of it. It's a must-try experience. Find the details in the caption.
